title: Fat Wolves x Fresh Animations
description: Make your wolves fat, and have more personality!
body:
This resource pack makes [Fat Wolves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fat-wolves) work with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)!

"I wonder where all of the sheep went."

![A fat wolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/853f232a751e3b3fe166ad71043f339fb3060cee.png)
